name: 陈子烨
topic: Can the use of BDT predict the result of competitions in Badminton tournaments?
briefNote: 研究监督学习，数据来源用羽毛球，目标为建模预测羽毛球比赛结果

sessions.title: TA #1
sessions.summary:
2026.04.15 进一步选题讨论


监督学习 (Supervised Learning)
关键词词库（可以自行更新）
英文	中文	解释
Supervised learning	监督学习	用带标签的历史数据训练模型，让它学会预测新数据的类别
samples	样本	收集的数据样本，包括多条记录
feature	特征	描述一个样本的输入变量，比如球员排名，维度实力等
label	标签	模型要预测的目标，比如“胜”或“负”
Feature engineering	特征工程	从原始数据中设计和选择对预测有帮助的特征
Data leakage	数据泄露	把只有在结果已知后才能得到的信息当作输入特征，导致模型虚假地表现很好

项目研究重点/难点
1.数据获取以及数据清洗
a.如何获取足够多的数据？比赛场次数能找到足够多吗？多少数据算是足够多？
b.不同的数据库和tournaments得来的数据格式是否一样？如何归一化格式？
c.是否有些重要信息需要手动收集（比如“一场比赛里的主动失分（失误）次数”）？如果是，需要花多长时间？
d.最重要的是从找得到（易获取）的特征中，挑有用的（相关性较强）的来进行分析
2.特征工程(Feature Engineering)
a.哪些特征是对预测胜负真正有帮助的？如何论证？
b.需不需要手动合成某些特征？
i.e.g. 选手积分可以直接获取，但是意义不大，而对战双方积分的差值很明显更具有意义，而这个就叫做合成特征
c.如何防止data leakage?
3.结果展示
a.Dissertation or artefact?
b.怎么展示自己的研究结果
5000单词论文如何写作

推荐参考文献
●Supervised Learning介绍：B. Liu, Web Data Mining, 2011（明天发送）
○不要当成“小说”或者中学课本来看（不需要一字一句看）
○大学课本：整体略读一遍，了解结构
●AdaBoost来源：Y. Freund, and R. E. Schapire. Experiments with a New Boosting Algorithm. In Proc. of the 13th Intl. Conf. on Machine Learning (ICML'96), pp. 148–156, 1996. 

时间规划
●22、29日两个竞赛
○本周或者下周进行第一次SA meeting
●5月份（尤其中旬之前）时间比较充裕
sessions.homework:
待完成任务：
●填写表1
○使用今天讨论到的项目重点和难点， 深度填写"Project outline"以及"Reasons for choosing the project"
sessions.transcript:
二、智能总结
讨论了项目计划和论文写作的各个方面。首先，讨论了项目选题，强调了找到一定数量和质量的比赛场次数据的重要性，并提出了如何推进项目的角度。接着，分享了关于监督学习和决策树的资料，并讨论了如何在论文中解释这些概念。然后，讨论了特征工程的定义和重要性，以及如何防止数据泄露。最后，讨论了论文的结构和内容，包括引言、文献综述、方法论、结果与讨论、评估与反思以及结论等部分，并对如何填写项目计划表格进行了指导。

三、会议摘要
这是一场关于EPQ（Extended Project Qualification）项目规划的指导会议。会议主要围绕羽毛球比赛胜负预测的机器学习模型展开，讨论了选题可行性、数据获取和论文结构等关键问题。导师和学生就项目的研究方向、文献综述和方法论进行了深入交流。
●  期中考试反馈与项目选题确认
    ୦ czy期中考试已完成，表现尚可。宋健对czy的思维导图表示认可，认为选题可行，前提是能找到足够的比赛数据。
    ୦ 选题方向为使用增强决策树（BDT）预测羽毛球比赛胜负，需确保数据量充足。
●  监督学习与BDT算法背景
    ୦ 监督学习是机器学习的一种方法，BDT是其实现工具之一。推荐参考刘冰教授的《Web Data Mining》第三章，了解监督学习基础。
    ୦ 人工智能是阶段性迭代的概念，需在论文中解释技术发展的延续性。
●  关键术语与特征工程
    ୦ 关键术语包括：标签（label）、样本（sample）、特征（feature）。特征工程是核心，需从原始数据中设计对预测有帮助的特征（如选手积分差值）。
    ୦ 需避免数据泄露（data leakage），即不能将结果相关数据（如比分）作为输入特征。
●  数据获取与研究难点
    ୦ 需获取足够多的比赛数据（如中羽在线、卡口网站），并解释数据量合理性。不同赛事数据格式可能不一致，需手动处理部分信息（如失误次数）。
    ୦ 若使用历史数据（如2015
    ୦2018年），需论证其时效性（如规则未大改）。
●  EPQ论文结构与内容规划
    ୦ 论文结构包括：引言（介绍AI迭代与监督学习）、文献综述（参考刘冰等）、方法论（BDT实现与特征工程）、结果与讨论（准确率分析）、反思与结论。
    ୦ 准确率超过50%即有意义，可结合假设检验（如p值<0.05）增强说服力。
●  后续计划与资源准备
    ୦ czy将优先完成EPQ表一（标题、提纲、理由），宋健提供《Web Data Mining》PDF及思维导图原文件。
    ୦ 计划在本周或下周与导师进行首次会议。

sessions.title: SA #1
sessions.summary:
Quick recap
This meeting was an introductory session between Garrie (the EPQ supervisor) and Chen Ziyue Convoy to discuss Convoy's planned Extended Project Qualification (EPQ) project. Convoy presented his proposal to use Boosted Decision Trees (BDT) to predict badminton tournament results, focusing on 1750-level competitions. He outlined several potential features including player ability ratings, head-to-head statistics, and home court advantages. Garrie expressed strong approval of the project's originality and practical application potential, particularly noting the opportunity for primary research by attending tournaments. The supervisor provided guidance on project administration, including the use of marking grids, reading logs, and various online forms (Forms 1-6) to track progress and documentation. They agreed to meet again in two weeks on May 8th, with Garrie emphasizing the importance of maintaining thorough records and regular communication through WeChat for ongoing support.

Two takeaways from the SA:
- Take photos of yourself collecting data when you are going to those VIP events
- “USE AI, AI is amazing for me, but just use it but don’t tell me you’ve used it.”
sessions.homework:
Begin filling in the reading log with research activities, ensuring to include main ideas, evaluation, and relevant details for each entry

Continue updating Form 6 (weekly activities log) with details of EPQ-related work, including time spent and activities completed

After the second meeting, draft and complete Form 4 (project plan) detailing all planned activities and timescales for the project

Prepare for the next meeting by continuing research and being ready to discuss progress on Form 2
sessions.transcript:
Summary
Badminton Tournament Prediction Project
Convoy presented his EPQ project proposal to Garrie, focusing on using Boosted Decision Trees (BDT) to predict outcomes in badminton tournaments. Convoy outlined his planned features including player abilities, head-to-head statistics, and environmental factors like home court advantage, with plans to collect data from tournaments and the badmintonCN.com app. Garrie approved of the project, particularly noting its potential for real-world applications and the opportunity for primary research at tournaments, while suggesting Convoy document his data collection process with photographs as evidence.

EPQ Project Requirements Discussion
Garrie and Chen Ziyue discussed the EPQ project requirements and marking criteria. Garrie explained the marking bands and emphasized the goal of keeping Chen Ziyue in the top marking band to achieve an A-star grade. They reviewed the planning stage (AO1) and research section (AO2) requirements, including the use of a Gantt chart and bibliography. Garrie mentioned providing additional forms on WeChat to help with the research and planning sections.

Project Reading Log System Overview
Garrie explained the reading log system to Convoy, emphasizing the importance of filling it in regularly throughout the project rather than waiting until the end. They discussed various online forms, including Form 6 (weekly diary) and Form 4 (project plan), with Garrie instructing Convoy to complete Form 4 after the second meeting once the project title is finalized. The next meeting was scheduled for May 8th, with Garrie offering flexibility for future meetings around Convoy's exam schedule.
